name: create_pin
description: Create a new pin on a specified board. Provide an image URL or media source, title, description, and optional destination link. The pin will appear on the board and in followers' feeds.

parameters.name: board_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the board to pin to.

parameters.name: media_source
parameters.description: The media source for the pin. Must include source_type ('image_url') and url.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The title of the pin (max 100 characters).

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: The description of the pin (max 800 characters).
parameters.example: Stunning sunset captured at the Pacific coast. Perfect for travel inspiration.

parameters.name: link
parameters.description: The destination URL when users click the pin.

parameters.name: alt_text
parameters.description: Accessibility text describing the pin image.
parameters.example: Orange and purple sunset over ocean waves

body.title: Beautiful Sunset Photography
body.description: Stunning sunset captured at the Pacific coast.
body.alt_text: Orange and purple sunset over ocean waves

body.title: Beautiful Sunset Photography
body.description: Stunning sunset captured at the Pacific coast.
